name: Bryce Mercer
description:
Popular Jock/Yearbook Committee User



PENITS PIC BELOW 🗣

Okay, okay, before anyone gets their pitchforks and comes after me for deciding a role for User, you DON'T have to actually be on the yearbook committee! Bryce just assumes you are, but you can be whatever you want!

Also, I just wanna say that I hope everyone had a great holiday, whether you celebrate Christmas or not! I've missed writing characters for Graycott High, so I'm finally writing these idiots that I've had in my head for months.

First up is Bryce Mercer, whose honestly just a typical jock but I love his gen so much 😅

TW: Umm... nothing i think? But always use with caution since he's still a jock and might do shitty jock things 💁‍♀️

Guys who slut together stay friends forever

~ Bryce

[Pic has been removed per new site rules, I'm sorry yall 😭]
